subject: Sports
title: Zinedine Zidane's Headbutt
description: A micro-lesson that makes Zinedine Zidane's Headbutt usable.

hook.text: The greatest player of his generation ended his career with a red card in a World Cup final.

buildup.text: Berlin 2006. Zidane had already scored a chipped penalty. France and Italy were heading to penalties.

discovery.text: Italian defender Marco Materazzi said something to Zidane. Zidane turned and headbutted him in the chest.

twist.text: Zidane was sent off. France lost the shootout. His final act as a player was walking past the trophy.

climax.text: The incident became one of the most replayed moments in sports history—debated for years.

punchline.text: A career of brilliance ended in ten seconds of fury.

quiz.question: What happened to Zidane in the 2006 World Cup final?
options: He headbutted Materazzi and was sent off
